# Scratch layout instructions

- `/scratch` is the explicit root for all paths.
- `set_paths` must receive a scratch-root argument and should error if none is
  provided.
- `/scratch/.github` is for active development repositories.
- `/scratch/.local` is for ready-to-use external material and installs.
- `/scratch/.venvs` is for Python virtual environments.
- `/scratch/EFFORTS` is for actual research runs, case-first.
- `/scratch/supplementary` is for reusable meshes and large inputs.
- `/scratch/.workspaces` is only for VS Code workspace files.
- `/scratch/.containers` is reserved for future container/workshop recipes.
